verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: sourceCommit points to the final functional v0.28.2 commit containing tool schema v3, generational repair limits, real replaceTool tasks, target-tool and material reservations, minimum public tool guarantees, replacement resource-flow accounting, daily reconciliation, long-run conservation checks, legacy v1/v2 migration and precise failed-load rollback for active replacement tasks; later documentation and this manifest commit follow it.
